utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 fields by name. However, several are not fully specified per requirements: transportation lacks specific flight details and costs; accommodation lacks hotel specifics and costs; activities lack individual costs; additional_services repeats airport transfers but no costs; total_budget is a single amount with no breakdown. travel_dates provided are 4 nights (Aug 10–14) which is 5 days, so dates are fine. Destination is specified. Therefore, fully specified items: destination (yes), travel_dates (yes), transportation (no), accommodation (no), activities (no), additional_services (no), total_budget (no). So 2 out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item mentioned in the final package to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. The final package includes: destination 'Lisbon, Portugal' (found under destinations), transportation 'Round-trip flights on a Budget Airline, Economy Class' (found under transportation > budget_airlines > Economy Class), accommodation 'Tranquil Inn' (found under accommodation), activities 'Guided City Walking Tour' (maps to 'City Walking Tour' under activities), 'a full Golf Day with equipment rental' (maps to 'Golf Day' under activities), and 'a dinner reservation at a celebrated Seafood Shack' (maps to 'Seafood Shack' under restaurants). Additional services 'Private airport transfers' maps to 'Airport Taxi' under additional_hotel_services. We then extract the exact ratings for those items.

final_package_text:
